clues.title: The Founding Seating Chart
clues.description: The 1882 wager's seating chart, framed and yellowing. Three deaths are annotated in Aster's own hand — chairs 2, 3, and 5, each with a date.

clues.title: Three Dates in Five Weeks
clues.description: Heart, fall, fever — three causes of death inked beneath the chart. Each interval between them is shorter than the last.
